caption: A man with a tall, spiky, light-colored hairstyle, glasses, and a headset sits in a room decorated with numerous framed pictures and clothing. He is wearing a white button-down shirt, a bowtie, and suspenders. He is positioned behind a black microphone on a boom arm. On the left side of the scene, a logo reads "ROSS TALK 101 PODCAST," and a similar logo appears on the right side of the scene, reading "ROSS TALK 101 PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man speaks, shifting his facial expressions and slightly adjusting his head position. In the final frames, he begins to move his arm, and a glass becomes partially visible in his hand. The background remains static, showing a collection of portraits and garments on hangers, including one item with the word "LEE" visible.
